mapper.sql: p.emp_plan_id, p.oprtr_id, o.oprtr_nm, p.emp_ver, p.emp_st_cd, p.rprt_yr, p.sbmt_dt, p.aprv_dt, p.aprv_user_id, p.rjct_dt, p.rjct_rsn, p.sig_chg_yn, p.prev_emp_plan_id, p.rmrk, p.use_bgng_dt, p.use_end_dt, p.frst_reg_dt, p.frst_reg_user_id, p.last_chg_dt, p.last_chg_user_id
FROM emp.tn_emp_plan p JOIN com.tn_oprtr o ON o.oprtr_id = p.oprtr_id AND NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt WHERE NOW() BETWEEN p.use_bgng_dt AND p.use_end_dt

sql.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM com.tn_vrfcn_assgn va WHERE va.vrfcn_inst_id = #{vrfcnInstId} AND va.oprtr_id = p.oprtr_id AND va.rprt_yr = p.rprt_yr AND NOW() BETWEEN va.use_bgng_dt AND va.use_end_dt )

mapper.select: SELECT p.emp_plan_id, p.oprtr_id, p.emp_ver, p.emp_st_cd, p.use_bgng_dt, p.use_end_dt FROM emp.tn_emp_plan p WHERE p.oprtr_id = #{oprtrId} AND p.emp_st_cd = 'APRVD' AND p.emp_plan_id != #{excludeId} AND NOW() BETWEEN p.use_bgng_dt AND p.use_end_dt ORDER BY p.aprv_dt DESC

SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(emp_plan_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)), 0 ) FROM emp.tn_emp_plan WHERE emp_plan_id LIKE #{prefix} || '%' AND SUBSTRING(emp_plan_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_plan (emp_plan_id, oprtr_id, emp_ver, emp_st_cd, rprt_yr, sig_chg_yn, prev_emp_plan_id, rmrk, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{oprtrId}, #{empVer}, 'DRAFT', #{rprtYr}, COALESCE(#{sigChgYn}, 'N'), #{prevEmpPlanId}, #{rmrk}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE emp.tn_emp_plan SET rprt_yr = COALESCE(#{rprtYr}, rprt_yr), sig_chg_yn = COALESCE(#{sigChgYn}, sig_chg_yn), rmrk = COALESCE(#{rmrk}, rmrk), last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND emp_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE emp.tn_emp_plan SET use_end_dt = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND emp_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE emp.tn_emp_plan SET emp_st_cd = 'SBMTD', sbmt_dt = NOW(), last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND emp_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE emp.tn_emp_plan SET emp_st_cd = 'DRAFT', rjct_dt = NOW(), rjct_rsn = #{rjctRsn}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND emp_st_cd = 'RVWNG' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE emp.tn_emp_plan SET emp_st_cd = 'APRVD', aprv_dt = NOW(), aprv_user_id = #{userId}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND emp_st_cd IN ('RVWNG', 'RCMDD') AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE emp.tn_emp_plan SET emp_st_cd = 'CNCLD', rjct_rsn = #{rjctRsn}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND emp_st_cd = 'APRVD' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
